tier: Tier 4.33 - Edge-of-Chaos Native Mechanism Transfer Contract
claim: Tier 4.33 locks the edge-of-chaos native mechanism transfer protocol: 6 migration stages, state budget (~568 bytes DTCM), compute assessment (O(n^2) per tick, ~18k ops at n=128), 5 failure classes with repair strategies, DTCM resource risk documented (w_rec 64KB near limit). Contract only; no C implementation or hardware execution.
caveat: Contract only; not C implementation, not hardware evidence, not a baseline freeze. DTCM budget risk at n=128 may require n=64 for first hardware smoke.
